description_long: This is a heavy-duty pipe wrench with a robust, metallic head and a dark wooden handle. The head features an adjustable jaw mechanism, allowing it to grip pipes or other cylindrical objects securely. The adjustment screw and jaw teeth are clearly visible, indicating its function for turning or holding pipes. The handle is cylindrical, smooth, and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip. The metallic parts have a matte, slightly worn finish, while the wooden handle has a polished, dark brown appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for demanding urban repair or plumbing tasks.
description: A sturdy pipe wrench with a metallic adjustable head and a polished dark wooden handle, designed for gripping and turning pipes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the adjustable jaw and the end of the handle, with the adjustment screw and gripping teeth visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the wrench, the metallic head, and the smooth wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the wooden handle and the back of the wrench head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the adjustment mechanism and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth, dark brown, with a slightly tapered end for grip.
attribute_head_type: Adjustable pipe wrench head with a flat jaw, serrated gripping teeth, and a visible adjustment screw.
